name: Green Curry Paste
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sliced Cilantro (Coriander Roots or Stems)
5 Thin Slices Fresh Galangal (or 1 teaspoon Dried Galangal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a blender.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Green curry paste is used to make the hottest of all Thai curries.
